itinerary.title: Singapore Universal Studios Special
itinerary.overview:
Universal Studios Singapore • Adventure Cove • S.E.A. Aquarium • Marina Bay 04 Nights / 05 Days Ultimate Singapore Theme Park Family Expedition SERIAL CODE: SG-003 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-USS-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore CATEGORY: Best Universal Studios Family Tour Package DURATION: 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore City & Sentosa Island

TOUR OVERVIEW
Dive into the thrilling world of entertainment with our TRAGUIN curated Universal Studios Special family tour. Focused on non-stop excitement and premium theme park access, this Singapore-Sentosa Family Expedition guarantees unforgettable memories, world-class theme park experiences, and seamless family leisure. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: SG-003 | Singapore Universal Studios Special | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore package (SG-003 / TRG-SIN-USS-2026): Universal Studios Singapore • Adventure Cove • S.E.A. Aquarium • Marina Bay with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN SINGAPORE & CITY VISTAS

days.title: ARRIVAL IN SINGAPORE & CITY VISTAS
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Private transfer to your premium family hotel. Spend the evening exploring the breathtaking Marina Bay area, enjoying the spectacular water light show.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: UNIVERSAL STUDIOS FULL-DAY IMMERSION
days.description: A full day of excitement at Universal Studios Singapore. With pre-arranged priority express passes, maximize your time on all the top movie-themed thrill rides—a perfect family experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: ADVENTURE COVE & S.E.A. AQUARIUM
days.description: Visit the massive S.E.A. Aquarium to witness spectacular marine life. In the afternoon, cool off at Adventure Cove Waterpark—an essential family tour highlight.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: SENTOSA ISLAND LEISURE & FUN
days.description: A day of leisure on Sentosa Island. Enjoy family-friendly attractions, beach time, and a grand farewell dinner, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium theme-park experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
